name: community-digest-sonnet45
description: Daily GitHub scan → rank changes → draft Discord posts (Claude Sonnet 4.5)

steps.name: Select Time Period
steps.description: Choose how far back to scan for changes

params.name: sinceDate
params.description: Show changes from this date onward

steps.name: Gather GitHub Changes
steps.description: Fetch commits, PRs, and issues from GitHub API

steps.name: Rank Changes
steps.description: AI ranks changes by community interest

steps.name: Review Ranking
steps.description: Human reviews and adjusts the ranking

steps.name: Draft Discord Posts
steps.description: AI drafts Discord posts from ranked changes

agent.prompt:
## Community Tone Rules

- No marketing language. No "exciting", "thrilled", "game-changing". State what was done, why it matters, what's next.
- Be specific. Mention the actual thing: the component, the step, the problem solved.
- Keep it short. 3-8 sentences max.
- Sound like an engineer talking to peers, not a company talking to customers.
- End with a real question or ask that invites an answer worth reading.
- No hashtags, no emojis in headers. One or two emojis inline are fine if natural.
- If the update is small, the post should be small.
- Don't explain what MediForce is in every post. The audience already knows.
- It's OK to share problems, not just wins.
- It's OK to think out loud.

steps.name: Review Posts
steps.description: Human approves or revises the drafted posts
